items.title: Slay the Spire: The Board Game — Downfall Expansion Kickstarter Live
items.summary: The Kickstarter for Downfall, an official expansion to Slay the Spire: The Board Game inspired by a community mod, is live now.

items.title: The Neowsletter — March 2026
items.summary: Mega Crit's March Neowsletter thanks the community for launch feedback and highlights the team's early reactions.

items.title: Patch Notes — Beta v0.99
items.summary: Patch v0.99 delivers bug fixes, art updates, and a new max-HP cap; rollout begins on select platforms.
